subject: English

title: 3.4 Final Review and Assessment
details: A collection of your best work
Read your compositions from Week 1 to Week 11
Title Page: Name, Class, Subject, Term
Present your portfolio to your group
evidence_excerpts: Oral reflection on the three main topics of Term 1: School Holidays, Letter Writing, and Examinations. The learner reflects on personal progress in English during Term 1 and identifies areas of strength. Review the topics we covered; Share our favorite English activities; Discuss how our writing has improved; Prepare for our final portfolio

Introducing the concept of a "Portfolio" and the criteria for selecting "best work." The learner uses vocabulary related to portfolios and selection criteria appropriately. A collection of your best work; Evidence of your learning; Criteria for selection: Neatness, Accuracy, Interest; Organized from start to finish

Reading through exercise books and selecting three pieces of work: one holiday narrative, one letter, and one examination-related composition. The learner evaluates their own written work against set criteria to select pieces for a portfolio. Read your compositions from Week 1 to Week 11; Compare your early work to your recent work; Check for teacher's comments and marks; Pick 3 pieces that show your best English
